title: Add input sanitizer middleware
description: Create `sanitizeInput(input: string): string` in `src/middleware/sanitize.ts` that strips HTML tags, trims whitespace, and normalizes unicode. Include comprehensive tests in `src/middleware/sanitize.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts — single-function utility module with typed exports
src/utils/debounce.test.ts — vitest co-located test file with describe/it/expect pattern
src/middleware/validation.ts — middleware utility function pattern in src/middleware/
